name: WhatsApp Operator
description: Handles inbound WhatsApp message routing and operator-level replies for business accounts.

name: Scheduler
description: Enables agents to create and manage scheduled reminders and time-based triggers.

name: Web Research
description: Provides structured web search, URL fetching, and content extraction capabilities.

name: Contact Manager
description: Manages WhatsApp contacts, groups, and per-contact memory enrichment.

name: Document Processor
description: Extracts and summarises content from PDFs, images, and office documents.

name: Code Reviewer
description: Reviews code snippets for bugs, style issues, and security vulnerabilities.
